mapper.sql:
/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > DAS 출고 대상 SQL */ WITH OB_BASE AS ( SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.CLASSIFSPECCD , OH.CBM , (OH.WEIGHT / 1000) AS WEIGHT , OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE , GREATEST(COALESCE(ICUTX.WIDTH, 0), COALESCE(ICUTX.DEPTH, 0), COALESCE(ICUTX.HEIGHT, 0)) AS MAXLEN , OD.ICKEY , OD.EXPCTQTY , OD.OBDTKEY , IC.PKOTICYN /*덕용여부*/ , IC.ROBSORTERICYN /*로봇여부*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTX ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTX.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTX.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICUTX.ICKEY AND OD.ICUNITKEY = ICUTX.ICUNITKEY AND OD.UOM = ICUTX.ICUNITTYPECD WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.WKTYPECD = 'DW' AND OH.WAHDKEY IS NULL AND OH.OBSTATUSCD = '00' AND OH.OBHDTYPECD IN ('10','20') AND OH.OBHDDAY BETWEEN #{obhddayfr} AND #{obhddayto} ), OB_INFO AS ( SELECT A.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY CLASSIFSPECCD ORDER BY CLASSIFSPECCD, OBHDKEY ASC, OBHDKEY ASC) AS ROWNO FROM ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , CLASSIFSPECCD , RECOMBOXBARCODE , CBM , WEIGHT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CTKEY) AS RNO , COUNT(ICKEY) AS SKU , SUM(EXPCTQTY) AS PCS , MAX(MAXLEN) AS MAXLEN , ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN ROBSORTERICYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100 / COUNT(*), 0) AS RBRATIO , SUM(CASE WHEN ROBSORTERICYN = 'N' THEN EXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS FBPCS , COUNT(OBDTKEY) AS OBDT_CNT FROM OB_BASE GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , CLASSIFSPECCD , RECOMBOXBARCODE , CBM , WEIGHT ) A WHERE 1=1
), OB_SKU AS ( SELECT OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.CLASSIFSPECCD , COUNT(DISTINCT OD.ICKEY) SKU FROM OB_INFO OB INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OB.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OB.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY GROUP BY OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.CLASSIFSPECCD )

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasSkuSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > DAS 출고 대상(SKU 집중화) SQL */ , ITEM_RANK AS ( /* [1단계] 품목코드별 등장 건수 순위 */ SELECT DT.CTKEY , DT.OWKEY , DT.ICKEY , HD.CLASSIFSPECCD , COUNT(DISTINCT DT.OBHDKEY) AS OBHD_CNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY HD.CLASSIFSPECCD ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT DT.OBHDKEY) DESC) AS ITEM_RK FROM OB_INFO HD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT DT ON HD.CTKEY = DT.CTKEY AND HD.OWKEY = DT.OWKEY AND HD.OBHDKEY = DT.OBHDKEY GROUP BY DT.CTKEY, DT.OWKEY, DT.ICKEY, HD.CLASSIFSPECCD ), HD_MATCH AS ( /* [2단계] 품목 우선순위별로, 그 품목을 포함한 헤더-규격 조합 매핑 */ SELECT HD.CTKEY , HD.OWKEY , HD.OBHDKEY , HD.CLASSIFSPECCD , IR.ICKEY , IR.ITEM_RK FROM OB_INFO HD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT DT ON HD.CTKEY = DT.CTKEY AND HD.OWKEY = DT.OWKEY AND HD.OBHDKEY = DT.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN ITEM_RANK IR ON DT.CTKEY = IR.CTKEY AND DT.OWKEY = IR.OWKEY AND DT.ICKEY = IR.ICKEY AND HD.CLASSIFSPECCD = IR.CLASSIFSPECCD ), OB_RANK AS ( /* [3단계] 규격별로, 품목 우선순위를 기준으로 헤더 순위를 매김 */ SELECT OBINFO.CTKEY , OBINFO.OWKEY , OBINFO.OBHDKEY , OBINFO.CLASSIFSPECCD , OBINFO.CBM , OBINFO.WEIGHT , OBINFO.RECOMBOXBARCODE , OBINFO.MAXLEN , OBINFO.SKU , OBINFO.PCS , OBINFO.OBDT_CNT , OB.RK AS RKNO FROM (SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY , CLASSIFSPECCD , MIN(ITEM_RK) AS BEST_ITEM_RK -- 헤더가 가진 품목 중 가장 높은 우선순위 , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY CLASSIFSPECCD ORDER BY MIN(ITEM_RK)) AS RK FROM HD_MATCH GROUP BY CTKEY, OWKEY, CLASSIFSPECCD, OBHDKEY) OB INNER JOIN OB_INFO OBINFO ON OB.CTKEY = OBINFO.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = OBINFO.OWKEY AND OB.OBHDKEY = OBINFO.OBHDKEY AND OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = OBINFO.CLASSIFSPECCD )
mapper.insert: /* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - obWaveMgmtPopCreateWaDtInsert - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 상세 저장 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_WA_DT ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WAHDKEY /*웨이브 공통 코드*/ , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈 코드*/ , RECOMBOXBARCODE /*추천 박스 바코드*/ , CLASSIFSPECCD /*분류 규격 코드*/ , VOL /*부피*/ , WEIGHT /*중량*/ , TTICCNT /*총 상품 개수*/ , TTICQTY /*총 상품 수량*/ , STNBARCODE /*스테이션바코드*/ , DELYN /*삭제여부*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{wahdkey} /*웨이브 공통 코드*/ , #{obhdkey} /*릴리즈 코드*/ , #{recomboxbarcode} /*추천 박스 바코드*/ , #{classifspeccd} /*분류 규격 코드*/ , #{vol} /*부피*/ , (CASE COALESCE(#{weight}, 0) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE #{weight} * 1000 END) /*중량*/ , #{tticcnt} /*총 상품 개수*/ , #{tticqty} /*총 상품 수량*/ , #{stnbarcode} /*스테이션바코드*/ , 'N' /*삭제여부*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - obWaveMgmtPopCreateDasCellInsert - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 DAS 셀 정보 저장 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_CELL ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WAHDKEY /*웨이브 공통 코드*/ , STNBARCODE /*스테이션 바코드*/ , CELLBARCODE /*셀바코드*/ , CLASSIFSPECCD /*분류규격코드*/ , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{wahdkey} /*웨이브 공통 코드*/ , #{stnbarcode} /*스테이션 바코드*/ , #{cellbarcode} /*셀바코드*/ , #{classifspeccd} /*분류규격코드*/ , #{obhdkey} /*릴리즈코드*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreateDasPltCell - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 DAS PLT 셀 정보 조회 */ SELECT MST.CTKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , #{wahdkey} AS WAHDKEY , #{stnbarcode} AS STNBARCODE , CST.STNBARCODE AS MDLCLASSIFSTNBARCODE , CST.CELLBARCODE AS MDLCLASSIFCELLBARCODE FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND MST.STNDIVCD = '20' /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ AND MST.CLASSIFDIVCD = '20' /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ AND MST.USEYN = 'Y' AND CST.CELLNO = #{cellnoPlt}

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreateDasLight1Cell - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 DAS Light1 셀 정보 조회 */ SELECT MST.CTKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , #{wahdkey} AS WAHDKEY , #{stnbarcode} AS STNBARCODE , CST.STNBARCODE AS MDLCLASSIFSTNBARCODE , CST.CELLBARCODE AS MDLCLASSIFCELLBARCODE FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND MST.STNDIVCD = '20' /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ AND MST.CLASSIFDIVCD = '10' /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ AND MST.CLASSIFTYPECD = '10' /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ AND MST.USEYN = 'Y' AND CST.CELLNO = #{cellnoLight1}

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreateDasLight2Cell - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 DAS Light2 셀 정보 조회 */ SELECT MST.CTKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , #{wahdkey} AS WAHDKEY , #{stnbarcode} AS STNBARCODE , CST.STNBARCODE AS MDLCLASSIFSTNBARCODE , CST.CELLBARCODE AS MDLCLASSIFCELLBARCODE FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND MST.STNDIVCD = '20' /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ AND MST.CLASSIFDIVCD = '10' /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ AND MST.CLASSIFTYPECD = '20' /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ AND MST.USEYN = 'Y' AND CST.CELLNO = #{cellnoLight2}
mapper.insert: /* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - obWaveMgmtPopCreateDasMidCellInsert - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 DAS 중분류 셀 정보 저장 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_STN_LC ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , STNBARCODE /*스테이션바코드*/ , MDLCLASSIFSTNBARCODE /*중분류스테이션바코드*/ , MDLCLASSIFCELLBARCODE /*중분류셀바코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{wahdkey} /*웨이브공통코드*/ , #{stnbarcode} /*스테이션바코드*/ , #{mdlclassifstnbarcode} /*중분류스테이션바코드*/ , #{mdlclassifcellbarcode} /*중분류셀바코드*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - obWaveMgmtPopCreateDasStnInsert - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 DAS 스테이션 정보 저장 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_STN ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WAHDKEY /*웨이브 헤더코드*/ , STNBARCODE /*스테이션 바코드*/ , CLASSIFSPECCD /*분류 규격 코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{wahdkey} /*웨이브 헤더코드*/ , #{stnbarcode} /*스테이션 바코드*/ , #{classifspeccd} /*분류 규격 코드*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )
mapper.select:
/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreateRbObList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 로봇 작업 계획 설정 > 출고 분석 현황 조회(로봇합포) */
SELECT RB.CTKEY , RB.OWKEY , RB.RB_OBHDKEY AS OBHDKEY , RB.CLASSIFSPECCD , RB.RECOMBOXBARCODE , RB.CBM AS VOL , RB.WEIGHT , RB.SKU AS TTICCNT , RB.RB_PCS AS TTICQTY , NULL AS WAHDKEY FROM OB_RB RB UNION ALL SELECT MX.CTKEY , MX.OWKEY , MX.MX_OBHDKEY AS OBHDKEY , MX.CLASSIFSPECCD , MX.RECOMBOXBARCODE , MX.CBM AS VOL , MX.WEIGHT , MX.SKU AS TTICCNT , MX.MX_PCS AS TTICQTY , NULL AS WAHDKEY FROM OB_MX MX
mapper.sql:
/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopSimpleSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 단포 작업 계획 설정 > 단포 출고 대상 SQL */ WITH OB_BASE AS ( SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.CBM , (OH.WEIGHT / 1000) AS WEIGHT , OH.CLASSIFSPECCD , OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE , GREATEST(COALESCE(ICUTX.WIDTH, 0), COALESCE(ICUTX.DEPTH, 0), COALESCE(ICUTX.HEIGHT, 0)) AS MAXLEN , OD.ICKEY , OD.EXPCTQTY , OD.OBDTKEY , IC.PKOTICYN /*덕용여부*/ , IC.ROBSORTERICYN /*로봇여부*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTX ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTX.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTX.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICUTX.ICKEY AND OD.ICUNITKEY = ICUTX.ICUNITKEY AND OD.UOM = ICUTX.ICUNITTYPECD WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.WKTYPECD = #{wktypecd} AND OH.WAHDKEY IS NULL AND OH.OBSTATUSCD = '00' AND OH.OBHDTYPECD IN ('10','20') AND OH.OBHDDAY BETWEEN #{obhddayfr} AND #{obhddayto} ), IC_INFO AS ( SELECT A.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.OBHDKEY ASC) AS ROWNO FROM ( SELECT OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.OBHDKEY , OB.CLASSIFSPECCD , OB.RECOMBOXBARCODE , INFO.SKU , INFO.PCS , INFO.CBM , INFO.WEIGHT , INFO.MAXLEN , INFO.RBRATIO , INFO.FBPCS FROM OB_BASE OB INNER JOIN ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CTKEY) AS RNO , COUNT(ICKEY) AS SKU , SUM(EXPCTQTY) AS PCS , SUM(CBM) AS CBM , SUM(WEIGHT) AS WEIGHT , MAX(MAXLEN) AS MAXLEN , SUM(CASE WHEN ROBSORTERICYN = 'N' THEN EXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS FBPCS , ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN ROBSORTERICYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100 / COUNT(*), 0) AS RBRATIO FROM OB_BASE GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ ) INFO ON OB.CTKEY = INFO.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = INFO.OWKEY AND OB.OBHDKEY = INFO.OBHDKEY GROUP BY OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.OBHDKEY , OB.CLASSIFSPECCD , OB.RECOMBOXBARCODE , INFO.SKU , INFO.PCS , INFO.CBM , INFO.WEIGHT , INFO.MAXLEN , INFO.RBRATIO , INFO.FBPCS ) A WHERE 1=1
)

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopSimpleSkuSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 단포 작업 계획 설정 > 단포 출고 대상(SKU 집중화) SQL */ , ITEM_RANK AS ( /* [1단계] 품목코드별 등장 건수 순위 */ SELECT DT.CTKEY , DT.OWKEY , DT.ICKEY , COUNT(DISTINCT DT.OBHDKEY) AS OBHD_CNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT DT.OBHDKEY) DESC) AS ITEM_RK FROM IC_INFO HD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT DT ON HD.CTKEY = DT.CTKEY AND HD.OWKEY = DT.OWKEY AND HD.OBHDKEY = DT.OBHDKEY GROUP BY DT.CTKEY, DT.OWKEY, DT.ICKEY ) , HD_MATCH AS ( /* [2단계] 품목 우선순위별로, 그 품목을 포함한 헤더 조합 매핑 */ SELECT HD.CTKEY , HD.OWKEY , HD.OBHDKEY , IR.ICKEY , IR.ITEM_RK FROM IC_INFO HD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT DT ON HD.CTKEY = DT.CTKEY AND HD.OWKEY = DT.OWKEY AND HD.OBHDKEY = DT.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN ITEM_RANK IR ON DT.CTKEY = IR.CTKEY AND DT.OWKEY = IR.OWKEY AND DT.ICKEY = IR.ICKEY ) , OB_RANK AS ( /* [3단계] 품목 우선순위를 기준으로 헤더 순위를 매김 */ SELECT OBINFO.CTKEY , OBINFO.OWKEY , OBINFO.OBHDKEY , OBINFO.CBM , OBINFO.WEIGHT , OBINFO.CLASSIFSPECCD , OBINFO.RECOMBOXBARCODE , OBINFO.MAXLEN , OBINFO.SKU , OBINFO.PCS , OB.RK AS RKNO FROM (SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY , MIN(ITEM_RK) AS BEST_ITEM_RK /* 헤더가 가진 품목 중 가장 높은 우선순위 */ , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY MIN(ITEM_RK)) AS RK FROM HD_MATCH GROUP BY CTKEY, OWKEY, OBHDKEY) OB INNER JOIN IC_INFO OBINFO ON OB.CTKEY = OBINFO.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = OBINFO.OWKEY AND OB.OBHDKEY = OBINFO.OBHDKEY )
mapper.insert: /* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - obWaveMgmtPopCreateWaHdInsert - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 헤더 저장 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_WA_HD ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WAHDKEY /*웨이브 공통코드*/ , WAHDDAY /*웨이브 헤더 일자*/ , WAHDNM /*웨이브 헤더 명*/ , WARND /*웨이브 회차*/ , WAWKSTATUSCD /*웨이브 작업 상태 코드*/ , WKTYPECD /*작업 유형 코드*/ , ORDALTMTTYPECD /*주문 배정 유형 코드*/ , DLVRYCORPCD /*택배사 코드*/ , CLASSIFPLANSNDYN /*분류계획전송여부*/ , LOCPLANSNDYN /*로케이션계획전송여부*/ , PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , CMT /*비고*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{wahdkey} /*웨이브 공통코드*/ , #{wahdday} /*웨이브 헤더 일자*/ , #{wahdnm} /*웨이브 헤더 명*/ , #{warnd} /*웨이브 회차*/ , #{wawkstatuscd} /*웨이브 작업 상태 코드*/ , #{wktypecd} /*작업 유형 코드*/ , #{ordaltmttypecd} /*주문 배정 유형 코드*/ , #{dlvrycorpcd} /*택배사 코드*/ , #{classifplansndyn} /*분류계획전송여부*/ , #{locplansndyn} /*로케이션계획전송여부*/ , #{pihdkey} /*피킹헤더코드*/ , #{cmt} /*비고*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtWkClassCellInfo - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - 릴리즈코드와 DAS 매핑 데이터 조회 */ SELECT SN.CTKEY , SN.OWKEY , SN.STNBARCODE , SN.CLASSIFSPECCD , CL.CELLBARCODE , STC.GRPNO , STC.PRINO FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_STN SN INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_CELL CL ON SN.CTKEY = CL.CTKEY AND SN.OWKEY = CL.OWKEY AND SN.WAHDKEY = CL.WAHDKEY AND SN.STNBARCODE = CL.STNBARCODE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL STC ON CL.CTKEY = STC.CTKEY AND CL.STNBARCODE = STC.STNBARCODE AND CL.CELLBARCODE = STC.CELLBARCODE WHERE SN.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND SN.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND SN.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND (STC.GRPNO IS NULL OR STC.PRINO IS NULL)

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtWkClassMappingList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - 릴리즈코드와 DAS 매핑 데이터 조회 */ WITH WA_BASE AS ( SELECT WH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브헤더코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OH.DASSTNBARCODE /*DAS 스테이션 바코드*/ , OH.CLASSIFSPECCD /*분류 규격 코드*/ , OH.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , COUNT(DISTINCT OD.ICKEY) AS SKU , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY WH.CTKEY, OH.DASSTNBARCODE, OH.CLASSIFSPECCD ORDER BY WH.CTKEY ASC, OH.DASSTNBARCODE ASC, OH.CLASSIFSPECCD, OH.WEIGHT DESC, OH.OBHDKEY) AS ROWNO FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WH.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WH.WKTYPECD IN ('DW') GROUP BY WH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브헤더코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*고객코드(릴리즈코드)*/ , OH.DASSTNBARCODE /*중분류그룹*/ , OH.CLASSIFSPECCD /*분류 규격 코드*/ , OH.WEIGHT /*중량*/ ), DASS_CELL AS ( SELECT SN.CTKEY , SN.OWKEY , SN.STNBARCODE , CL.CLASSIFSPECCD , CL.CELLBARCODE , STC.GRPNO , COALESCE(STC.PRINO, 99) AS PRINO , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY STC.CTKEY, STC.STNBARCODE, CL.CLASSIFSPECCD ORDER BY STC.GRPNO ASC, COALESCE(CAST(STC.PRINO AS NUMERIC), 99) ASC, CAST(STC.CELLNO AS NUMERIC) ASC) AS ROWNO FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_STN SN INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_CELL CL ON SN.CTKEY = CL.CTKEY AND SN.OWKEY = CL.OWKEY AND SN.WAHDKEY = CL.WAHDKEY AND SN.STNBARCODE = CL.STNBARCODE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL STC ON CL.CTKEY = STC.CTKEY AND CL.STNBARCODE = STC.STNBARCODE AND CL.CELLBARCODE = STC.CELLBARCODE WHERE SN.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND SN.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND SN.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} ) SELECT WA.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WA.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WA.WAHDKEY /*웨이브헤더코드*/ , WA.OBHDKEY /*고객코드(릴리즈코드)*/ , CL.CELLBARCODE /*DAS셀 바코드*/ , WA.DASSTNBARCODE /*중분류그룹*/ , WA.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY WA.CTKEY, WA.DASSTNBARCODE, WA.CLASSIFSPECCD, CL.GRPNO ORDER BY WA.CTKEY ASC, WA.DASSTNBARCODE ASC, WA.CLASSIFSPECCD ASC, CL.GRPNO ASC, WA.SKU DESC, CL.PRINO ASC, WA.OBHDKEY) AS ROWNO FROM WA_BASE WA INNER JOIN DASS_CELL CL ON WA.CTKEY = CL.CTKEY AND WA.DASSTNBARCODE = CL.STNBARCODE AND WA.CLASSIFSPECCD = CL.CLASSIFSPECCD AND WA.ROWNO = CL.ROWNO

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtWkClassList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - 웨이브 릴리즈 리스트 조회 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WH.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WH.WKTYPECD IN ('DW','RW','PW') AND WH.WAWKSTATUSCD IN ('20','25') AND COALESCE(WH.CLASSIFPLANSNDYN, 'N') = 'N' AND OH.OBSTATUSCD = '10'

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtWkClassRbYNList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - 상품 마스터 로봇 소터여부 조회 */ SELECT OD.CTKEY , OD.OWKEY , OD.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , OD.ICKEY , COALESCE(IC.ROBSORTERICYN, 'N') AS ROBSORTERICYN FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey}

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtWkClassSend2Level - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - 분류계획 2Level 조회 */ SELECT OH.OBHDKEY /*고객코드(릴리즈코드)*/ , REPLACE(OH.DASCELLBARCODE,'-','') AS DASCELLBARCODE /*DAS셀 바코드*/ , OH.DASSTNBARCODE /*중분류그룹*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN BOX.BOXNM ELSE '' END) AS RECOMBOXBARCODE /*포장박스사이즈*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN (CASE WHEN (SUM(CASE IC.ROBSORTERICYN WHEN 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) ELSE '' END) AS YNOTHER /*이형물 존재여부*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN OH.WBLNO ELSE '' END) AS WBLNO /*송장번호*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.DPRTSPOTTMNLNM ELSE '' END) AS DPRTSPOTTMNLNM /*발송지 터미널명*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.DPRTSPOTTMNLCD ELSE '' END) AS DPRTSPOTTMNLCD /*발송지 터미널코드*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.DESTSPOTTMNLNM ELSE '' END) AS DESTSPOTTMNLNM /*도착지 터미널명*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.DESTSPOTTMNLCD ELSE '' END) AS DESTSPOTTMNLCD /*도착치 터미널코드*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.DESTSPOTPOSTOFICCD ELSE '' END) AS DESTSPOTPOSTOFICCD /*집배점 코드*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.DESTSPOTPOSTOFICNM ELSE '' END) AS DESTSPOTPOSTOFICNM /*집배점 명*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.RGONDIV ELSE '' END) AS RGONDIV /*권역구분*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.HUBCD ELSE '' END) AS HUBCD /*허브코드*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.MDLCLASSIFCD ELSE '' END) AS MDLCLASSIFCD /*중분코드*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.DLVYEMPCLASSIFCD ELSE '' END) AS DLVYEMPCLASSIFCD /*배송사원 분류코드*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.DLVYEMPCD ELSE '' END) AS DLVYEMPCD /*배송사원 코드*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.DLVYEMPNM ELSE '' END) AS DLVYEMPNM /*배송 사원명*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN '' ELSE '' END) AS DSTRAN /*운임*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HS.MEMO1 || HS.MEMO2 || HS.MEMO3 || HS.MEMO4 ELSE '' END) AS DSMEMO /*메모*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN OH.RCPPRSNADDR1 ELSE '' END) AS RCPPRSNADDR1 /*받는분 주소*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN OH.RCPPRSNADDR2 ELSE '' END) AS RCPPRSNADDR2 /*받는분 주소1*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HP.ADDRPRINFO ELSE '' END) AS ADDRPRINFO /*받는분 주소약칭*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HS.RCPPRSNNM ELSE '' END) AS RCPPRSNNM /*받는분이름*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HS.RCPPRSNTELNO ELSE '' END) AS RCPPRSNTELNO /*받는분전화*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HS.RCPPRSNTELNO2 ELSE '' END) AS RCPPRSNTELNO2 /*받는분핸드폰*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HS.SNDPRSNADDR1 || HS.SNDPRSNADDR2 ELSE '' END) AS SNDADDR /*보내는분주소*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HS.SNDPRSNNM ELSE '' END) AS SNDPRSNNM /*보내는분이름*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HS.SNDPRSNTELNO ELSE '' END) AS SNDPRSNTELNO /*보내는분전화*/ , (CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD IN ('RW','PW') THEN HS.SNDPRSNTELNO2 ELSE '' END) AS SNDPRSNTELNO2 /*보내는분핸드폰*/ , OH.WEIGHT /*중량*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WH.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_HANJIN_PR HP ON OH.CTKEY = HP.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = HP.OWKEY AND OH.OBORDKEY = HP.OBORDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_HANJIN_SBM HS ON OH.CTKEY = HS.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = HS.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = HS.OBHDKEY AND OH.WBLNO = HS.WBLNO LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_BOX BOX ON OH.CTKEY = BOX.CTKEY AND OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE = BOX.BOXBARCODE WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} GROUP BY OH.OBHDKEY /*고객코드(릴리즈코드)*/ , OH.DASCELLBARCODE /*DAS셀 바코드*/ , OH.DASSTNBARCODE /*중분류그룹*/ , BOX.BOXNM /*포장박스사이즈*/ , OH.WBLNO /*송장번호*/ , HP.DPRTSPOTTMNLNM /*발송지 터미널명*/ , HP.DPRTSPOTTMNLCD /*발송지 터미널코드*/ , HP.DESTSPOTTMNLNM /*도착지 터미널명*/ , HP.DESTSPOTTMNLCD /*도착치 터미널코드*/ , HP.DESTSPOTPOSTOFICCD /*집배점 코드*/ , HP.DESTSPOTPOSTOFICNM /*집배점 명*/ , HP.RGONDIV /*권역구분*/ , HP.HUBCD /*허브코드*/ , HP.MDLCLASSIFCD /*중분코드*/ , HP.DLVYEMPCLASSIFCD /*배송사원 분류코드*/ , HP.DLVYEMPCD /*배송사원 코드*/ , HP.DLVYEMPNM /*배송 사원명*/ , HS.MEMO1 , HS.MEMO2 , HS.MEMO3 , HS.MEMO4 /*메모*/ , OH.RCPPRSNADDR1 /*받는분 주소1*/ , OH.RCPPRSNADDR2 /*받는분 주소2*/ , HP.ADDRPRINFO /*받는분 주소약칭*/ , HS.RCPPRSNNM /*받는분이름*/ , HS.RCPPRSNTELNO /*받는분전화*/ , HS.RCPPRSNTELNO2 /*받는분핸드폰*/ , HS.SNDPRSNADDR1 /*보내는분주소*/ , HS.SNDPRSNADDR2 /*보내는분주소*/ , HS.SNDPRSNNM /*보내는분이름*/ , HS.SNDPRSNTELNO /*보내는분전화*/ , HS.SNDPRSNTELNO2 /*보내는분핸드폰*/ , OH.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , WH.WKTYPECD ORDER BY OH.DASSTNBARCODE ASC , OH.WEIGHT DESC , OH.OBHDKEY ASC

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtWkClassSend3Level - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - 분류계획 3Level 조회 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD = 'PW' THEN ICBINN.BARCODE ELSE ICBEA.BARCODE END AS BARCODE /*상품바코드1*/ , CASE WHEN WH.WKTYPECD = 'PW' THEN ICBCTN.BARCODE ELSE ICBEA.BARCODE END AS BARCODE2 /*상품바코드2*/ , OD.ALQTY /*오더수량*/ , IC.LCKEY /*보관로케이션*/ , (CASE IC.ROBSORTERICYN WHEN 'N' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS ROBSORTERICYN /*이형물여부*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WH.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE ICBEA ON OD.CTKEY = ICBEA.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICBEA.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICBEA.ICKEY AND OD.UOM = ICBEA.UOM LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE ICBINN ON OD.CTKEY = ICBINN.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICBINN.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICBINN.ICKEY AND ICBINN.UOM = 'INN' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE ICBCTN ON OD.CTKEY = ICBCTN.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICBCTN.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICBCTN.ICKEY AND ICBCTN.UOM = 'CTN' WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OD.ALQTY > 0

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtWkClassSend1Level - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - 분류계획 1Level 조회 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WH.WAHDDAY /*작업일자*/ , WH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브헤더코드*/ , CD.CTCDDTKEY /*장비구분*/ , WH.WAHDDAY AS WKDATE /*작업일자*/ , #{surkey} AS WAVESENDER /*웨이브 송신자*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD ON WH.CTKEY = CD.CTKEY AND CD.CTCDHDKEY = 'FACTYPE' AND WH.WKTYPECD = CD.CTCDDTVAL WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey}

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtDasCellList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - DAS 셀 정보 조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY , SN.STNBARCODE FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_STN SN ON WH.CTKEY = SN.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = SN.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = SN.WAHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WH.WKTYPECD IN ('DW')

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtDas - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - 중분류 DAS 로케이션 1LEVEL */ SELECT WH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WH.WAHDDAY /*작업일자*/ , WH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브헤더코드*/ , CD.CTCDDTKEY /*장비구분*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD ON WH.CTKEY = CD.CTKEY AND CD.CTCDHDKEY = 'FACTYPE' AND WH.WKTYPECD = CD.CTCDDTVAL WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WH.WKTYPECD IN ('DW')

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopInfo_T01_Add_WaAddProcWaDt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 정보 상세 > 출고 계획 > 추가 - 웨이브 저장을 위한 주문정보 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , #{wahdkey} AS WAHDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE , OH.CLASSIFSPECCD , OH.CBM AS VOL , OH.WEIGHT , COUNT(DISTINCT OD.ICKEY) AS TTICCNT , SUM(OD.EXPCTQTY) AS TTICQTY , (SELECT OBHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD WHERE WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY) AS WADTYN FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.WAHDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE , OH.CLASSIFSPECCD , OH.CBM , OH.WEIGHT
mapper.insert: /* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - insertWaveMgmtPopInfo_T01_Add_WaAddProcWaDt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 정보 상세 > 출고 계획 > 추가 - 웨이브 상세 저장 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_WA_DT ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WAHDKEY /*웨이브 공통 코드*/ , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈 코드*/ , RECOMBOXBARCODE /*추천 박스 바코드*/ , CLASSIFSPECCD /*분류 규격 코드*/ , VOL /*부피*/ , WEIGHT /*중량*/ , TTICCNT /*총 상품 개수*/ , TTICQTY /*총 상품 수량*/ , DELYN /*삭제여부*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{wahdkey} /*웨이브 공통 코드*/ , #{obhdkey} /*릴리즈 코드*/ , #{recomboxbarcode} /*추천 박스 바코드*/ , #{classifspeccd} /*분류 규격 코드*/ , #{vol} /*부피*/ , (CASE COALESCE(#{weight}, 0) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE #{weight} * 1000 END) /*중량*/ , #{tticcnt} /*총 상품 개수*/ , #{tticqty} /*총 상품 수량*/ , 'N' /*삭제여부*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopInfo_T01_Add_WaExcepList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 정보 상세 > 출고 계획 > 제외 > 출고주문 제외 대상 조회 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY , WD.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , OH.DASSTNBARCODE , OD.ALQTY , OD.OBDTSTATUSCD FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND WH.WAWKSTATUSCD IN ('05','10','11','15','20','25') AND OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('00','01','05','10') AND WD.DELYN = 'N'

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopInfo_T01_WaExcep_ObHdCnt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 정보 상세 > 출고 계획 > 제외 - 제외 안된 릴리즈 코드가 있는지 확인 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WD.DELYN = 'N'

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectwaveMgmtPopInfo_T01_ReAllocate_WaAddAlObDt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 정보 상세 > 출고 계획 > 재할당 - 웨이브에 재할당할 대상 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , OD.ICKEY , OD.EXPCTQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND WH.WAWKSTATUSCD IN ('00','05','10','11','15','20','25') AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('00','05') AND OD.EXPCTQTY > 0 AND OD.EXPCTQTY > OD.ALQTY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectwaveMgmtPopInfo_T01_StockOut_ObDt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 정보 상세 > 출고 계획 > 미할당처리 - 웨이브에 미할당처리 대상 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('00', '05') AND WH.WAWKSTATUSCD IN ('00','05','10','11','15','20','25') AND OD.EXPCTQTY > 0 AND OD.EXPCTQTY > OD.ALQTY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaDelAldt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 삭제 - 출고주문 할당취소 대상 조회 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY , WD.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , OD.ALQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WH.WAWKSTATUSCD IN ('05','10','11','15','20','25','30') AND OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('05','10') AND WD.DELYN = 'N' AND OD.ALQTY > 0

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopTaskList_pkCnfrmCnlHdProc - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 작업현황 > 주문별 > 피킹확정취소 - 피킹 확정 리스트 조회 */ SELECT WA.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WA.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WD.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ , OD.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드(출고상세코드)*/ , WA.PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , PD.PIDTKEY /*피킹상세코드*/ , PD.PKDTWKSTATUSCD /*피킹상세 작업상태 코드*/ , PD.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , PD.CNFRMQTY /*확정수량*/ , PD.IVATKEY /*재고속성코드*/ , PD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , PD.LCKEY /*로케이션코드*/ , PD.FROMLCKEY /*FROM 로케이션코드*/ , PD.TOLCKEY /*TO 로케이션코드*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WA INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WA.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WA.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WA.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PD ON OD.CTKEY = PD.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = PD.OWKEY AND OD.OBHDKEY = PD.OBHDKEY AND OD.OBDTKEY = PD.OBDTKEY WHERE WA.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WA.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND WA.WKTYPECD = 'PW' AND OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('25','30') AND PD.PKDTWKSTATUSCD = '10' ORDER BY PD.IVATKEY, PD.LCKEY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopTaskList_PkCnfrmHdProc - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 작업현황 > 주문별 > 피킹확정 - 피킹 지시 리스트 조회 */ SELECT WA.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WA.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WD.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ , OD.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드(출고상세코드)*/ , WA.PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , PD.PIDTKEY /*피킹상세코드*/ , PD.PKDTWKSTATUSCD /*피킹상세 작업상태 코드*/ , PD.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , (PD.EXPCTQTY - PD.CNFRMQTY) AS CNFRMQTY /*잔여수량*/ , PD.IVATKEY /*재고속성코드*/ , PD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , PD.FROMLCKEY /*FROM 로케이션코드*/ , PD.TOLCKEY /*TO 로케이션코드*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WA INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WA.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WA.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WA.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PD ON OD.CTKEY = PD.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = PD.OWKEY AND OD.OBHDKEY = PD.OBHDKEY AND OD.OBDTKEY = PD.OBDTKEY WHERE WA.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WA.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND WA.WKTYPECD = 'PW' AND WA.WAWKSTATUSCD IN ('40','50') AND OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('20','25') AND PD.PKDTWKSTATUSCD = '00'

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopTaskList_nisHoldMap - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 작업현황 > 주문별 > 결품보류 - 이전릴리즈 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브 공통 코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ , OH.PCKGSTNBARCODE /*포장 스테이션 바코드*/ , OH.PCKGBOXBARCODE /*포장 박스 유형 코드*/ , OH.PREOBHDKEY , COALESCE(OHC.CNT, 0) AS CNT FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.PREOBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} GROUP BY OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ ) OHC ON OH.CTKEY = OHC.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OHC.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OHC.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OH.WKTYPECD = 'PW' AND OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('25','30')

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopTaskList_nisHoldList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 작업현황 > 주문별 > 결품보류 - 결품 처리 리스트 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ , OD.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드(출고상세코드)*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , 0 AS TOPAKQTY /*패킹수량*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OH.WKTYPECD = 'PW' AND OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('25','30')

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopTaskList_obComplProc - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 작업현황 > 주문별 > 출고완료 - 피킹 확정 리스트 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브 공통 코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ , OH.PCKGSTNBARCODE /*포장 스테이션 바코드*/ , OH.PCKGBOXBARCODE /*포장 박스 유형 코드*/ , OH.PREOBHDKEY , COALESCE(OHC.CNT, 0) AS CNT FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.PREOBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} GROUP BY OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ ) OHC ON OH.CTKEY = OHC.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OHC.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OHC.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OH.WKTYPECD = 'PW' AND OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('25','30')

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopTaskList_packList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 작업현황 > 주문별 > 출고완료 - 패킹 상품 리스트 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ , OD.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드(출고상세코드)*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , OD.PKQTY AS TOPAKQTY /*패킹수량*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OH.WKTYPECD = 'PW' AND OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('25','30') ORDER BY OD.ICKEY
mapper.insert: /* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - obWaveMgmtPopCreWaDtInsert - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 상세 저장 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_WA_DT ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WAHDKEY /*웨이브 공통 코드*/ , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈 코드*/ , RECOMBOXBARCODE /*추천 박스 바코드*/ , CLASSIFSPECCD /*분류 규격 코드*/ , VOL /*부피*/ , WEIGHT /*중량*/ , TTICCNT /*총 상품 개수*/ , TTICQTY /*총 상품 수량*/ , DELYN /*삭제여부*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{wahdkey} /*웨이브 공통 코드*/ , #{obhdkey} /*릴리즈 코드*/ , #{recomboxbarcode} /*추천 박스 바코드*/ , #{classifspeccd} /*분류 규격 코드*/ , #{vol} /*부피*/ , (CASE #{weight} WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE #{weight} * 1000 END) /*중량*/ , #{tticcnt} /*총 상품 개수*/ , #{tticqty} /*총 상품 수량*/ , 'N' /*삭제여부*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - obWaveMgmtPopCreDasCellInsert - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 DAS 셀 정보 저장 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_CELL ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WAHDKEY /*웨이브 공통 코드*/ , STNBARCODE /*스테이션 바코드*/ , CELLBARCODE /*셀바코드*/ , CLASSIFSPECCD /*분류규격코드*/ , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{wahdkey} /*웨이브 공통 코드*/ , #{stnbarcode} /*스테이션 바코드*/ , #{cellbarcode} /*셀바코드*/ , #{classifspeccd} /*분류규격코드*/ , #{obhdkey} /*릴리즈코드*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreDasPltCell - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 DAS PLT 셀 정보 조회 */ SELECT MST.CTKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , #{wahdkey} AS WAHDKEY , #{stnbarcode} AS STNBARCODE , CST.STNBARCODE AS MDLCLASSIFSTNBARCODE , CST.CELLBARCODE AS MDLCLASSIFCELLBARCODE FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND MST.STNDIVCD = '20' /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ AND MST.CLASSIFDIVCD = '20' /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ AND MST.USEYN = 'Y' AND CST.CELLNO = #{cellnoPlt}

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreDasLight1Cell - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 DAS Light1 셀 정보 조회 */ SELECT MST.CTKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , #{wahdkey} AS WAHDKEY , #{stnbarcode} AS STNBARCODE , CST.STNBARCODE AS MDLCLASSIFSTNBARCODE , CST.CELLBARCODE AS MDLCLASSIFCELLBARCODE FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND MST.STNDIVCD = '20' /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ AND MST.CLASSIFDIVCD = '10' /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ AND MST.CLASSIFTYPECD = '10' /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ AND MST.USEYN = 'Y' AND CST.CELLNO = #{cellnoLight1}

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreDasLight2Cell - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 DAS Light2 셀 정보 조회 */ SELECT MST.CTKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , #{wahdkey} AS WAHDKEY , #{stnbarcode} AS STNBARCODE , CST.STNBARCODE AS MDLCLASSIFSTNBARCODE , CST.CELLBARCODE AS MDLCLASSIFCELLBARCODE FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND MST.STNDIVCD = '20' /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ AND MST.CLASSIFDIVCD = '10' /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ AND MST.CLASSIFTYPECD = '20' /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ AND MST.USEYN = 'Y' AND CST.CELLNO = #{cellnoLight2}
mapper.insert: /* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - obWaveMgmtPopCreDasMidCellInsert - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 DAS 중분류 셀 정보 저장 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_STN_LC ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , STNBARCODE /*스테이션바코드*/ , MDLCLASSIFSTNBARCODE /*중분류스테이션바코드*/ , MDLCLASSIFCELLBARCODE /*중분류셀바코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{wahdkey} /*웨이브공통코드*/ , #{stnbarcode} /*스테이션바코드*/ , #{mdlclassifstnbarcode} /*중분류스테이션바코드*/ , #{mdlclassifcellbarcode} /*중분류셀바코드*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - obWaveMgmtPopCreDasStnInsert - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 DAS 스테이션 정보 저장 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_STN ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WAHDKEY /*웨이브 헤더코드*/ , STNBARCODE /*스테이션 바코드*/ , CLASSIFSPECCD /*분류 규격 코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{wahdkey} /*웨이브 헤더코드*/ , #{stnbarcode} /*스테이션 바코드*/ , #{classifspeccd} /*분류 규격 코드*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - obWaveMgmtPopCreWaHdInsert - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > > 저장 > 웨이브 헤더 저장 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_WA_HD ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WAHDKEY /*웨이브 공통코드*/ , WAHDDAY /*웨이브 헤더 일자*/ , WAHDNM /*웨이브 헤더 명*/ , WARND /*웨이브 회차*/ , WAWKSTATUSCD /*웨이브 작업 상태 코드*/ , WKTYPECD /*작업 유형 코드*/ , ORDALTMTTYPECD /*주문 배정 유형 코드*/ , DLVRYCORPCD /*택배사 코드*/ , CLASSIFPLANSNDYN /*분류계획전송여부*/ , LOCPLANSNDYN /*로케이션계획전송여부*/ , PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , CMT /*비고*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{wahdkey} /*웨이브 공통코드*/ , #{wahdday} /*웨이브 헤더 일자*/ , #{wahdnm} /*웨이브 헤더 명*/ , #{warnd} /*웨이브 회차*/ , #{wawkstatuscd} /*웨이브 작업 상태 코드*/ , #{wktypecd} /*작업 유형 코드*/ , #{ordaltmttypecd} /*주문 배정 유형 코드*/ , #{dlvrycorpcd} /*택배사 코드*/ , #{classifplansndyn} /*분류계획전송여부*/ , #{locplansndyn} /*로케이션계획전송여부*/ , #{pihdkey} /*피킹헤더코드*/ , #{cmt} /*비고*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaFailAldt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 생성 > 실패시 삭제 - 출고주문 할당취소 대상 조회 */ SELECT WD.CTKEY , WD.OWKEY , WD.WAHDKEY , WD.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , OD.ALQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE WD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WD.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('05','10') AND WD.DELYN = 'N' AND OD.ALQTY > 0
